gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.hair_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T1.height_cm = 185 AND T2.race = 'Human'
pred_sql:
SELECT c.colour
FROM superhero s
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
JOIN colour c ON s.hair_colour_id = c.id
WHERE s.height_cm = 185
  AND LOWER(r.race) = 'human';
question: Provide the hair colour of the human superhero who is 185 cm tall.
